name: agent-it-tools
description: Deterministic developer utilities for agents: the agent-it-tools CLI plugin (it-tools ported to a single fast binary with machine-verified docs).

plugins.name: agent-it-tools
plugins.description: Language models predict; this binary computes. 62 deterministic developer utilities (hashing, encoding, conversion, jq, JWT, cron, regex, diff, subnets, timezones, ...) as a fast local CLI built for agents.
